markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define legal docs for GrowthX's upcoming LLM dashboarding tool.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Product Scope:** Focus on the `checkthat.ai` B2B dashboarding tool launching in Nov/Dec, which tracks brand mentions in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Hybrid Legal Model:** A Privacy Policy (PP) covers logged-out users, while Terms of Service (ToS) and a DPA govern paying business customers.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**IP Strategy:** GrowthX will claim ownership of all user inputs and outputs for model training, a point of potential customer friction that can be negotiated.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Critical Path:** The PP and ToS are required for Google Sign-In integration and must be live on `checkthat.ai` before launch.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

## Topics

### Product Scope & Launch Timeline

  - [**Product:** `checkthat.ai`, a web-based dashboard for tracking brand mentions and citations in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Launch:** Nov/Dec 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [**Audience:** Primarily B2B, though open to anyone. GrowthX will treat all logged-in users as business customers.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Data Collected:**](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**User Profile:** Name, email, company, job title.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Tracking:** IP address, browser info, cookies.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Customer Inputs:** Domains, product categories, keywords, and prompts to track.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Billing:** Details (name, address) via third-party processor (e.g., Stripe).](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Legal Documentation Strategy

  - [**Hybrid Model:** A two-part legal structure to manage user types.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Logged-Out Users → Privacy Policy (PP):** Covers website visitors. GrowthX acts as a data controller.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Paying Customers → ToS & DPA:** Applies to all logged-in users. GrowthX acts as a data processor.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**DPA Inclusion:** The DPA will be referenced by default in the ToS.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Simplifies compliance, especially for EU users where DPAs are mandatory.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Cookie Consent:** A broad cookie policy will be drafted.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX must implement a Consent Management Provider (CMP) to manage the banner and prevent cookies from firing before user consent.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**GDPR Readiness:** The PP will include data subject rights (access, deletion, etc.) to project GDPR readiness.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [**Note:** This creates a compliance obligation for GrowthX to fulfill user requests.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Intellectual Property (IP) & Data Use

  - [**GrowthX IP Ownership:** The ToS will state GrowthX owns all user inputs (prompts) and outputs (recommendations).](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To use this data for training and improving its models.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Potential Customer Friction:** This ownership claim is a common point of negotiation.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Market Context:** Competitors like OpenAI often grant customers ownership and only request a right to anonymize data for training.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
      - [**GrowthX Position:** The ToS is a click-through agreement. For larger customers, this point can be negotiated in a separate Master Service Agreement (MSA).](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**Privacy vs. IP Conflict:** A DPA restricts GrowthX from commingling customer PII.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [**Risk:** If prompts or outputs contain PII, GrowthX must filter it to comply with the DPA while still using the data for IP purposes.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use techniques like named entity replacement (e.g., replacing "Bridget" with "Purple7").](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jonathan (Goodwin):** Draft Privacy Policy and DPA.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Sam (Goodwin):** Draft Terms of Service.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**Goodwin Team:** Deliver all drafts to GrowthX by mid-next week.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Review drafts upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Implement a Consent Management Provider (CMP) for the cookie banner.](https://fathom.video/share/-VNBYKX9JJ2MS2-xvoNVX7tXUvpaqw5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
